questions.question: A doctor walks into the exam room and says, 'I have good news and bad news.' What is the patient most likely thinking?
questions.correct_answer: The bill will be the bad news
options: The bill will be the bad news
The doctor forgot their name again
The doctor is about to prescribe kale
The doctor wants to borrow money

questions.question: Why did the doctor bring a red pen to work?
questions.correct_answer: In case they needed to draw blood
options: In case they needed to draw blood

questions.question: A patient says, 'Doctor, I feel like a pair of curtains.' What does the doctor reply?
Why did the cow become an astronaut?
options: To join the Milky Way union

questions.question: What do you call a bear with no teeth?
Why did the chicken join a band?
options: Because it wanted to wing it
Because it crossed the road to the concert
Because it needed a new pecking order

questions.question: Why did the flower start telling jokes?
questions.correct_answer: It wanted to be a blooming comedian
options: It wanted to be a blooming comedian
It was tired of being picked on
It wanted to grow its audience
It needed to plant new ideas

questions.question: What do flowers do when they get embarrassed?
Why did the sunflower bring a ladder to the garden?
questions.correct_answer: It wanted to reach new heights
options: It wanted to reach new heights
It was tired of being overshadowed
It wanted to look down on the daisies
It was climbing the social stem
